title: AWX Inventory Sync From Cloud Source Failures
dataSources: AWX inventory update jobs and server logs
app: AWX external logging + optional Tower syslog forwarder
spl:
index=automation sourcetype="awx:job_events" OR sourcetype="awx:server"
| search "inventory" AND ("sync" OR "update") AND ("fail" OR "error" OR "403" OR "429")
| stats latest(_time) as last_err, count by inventory_id, source
| sort -count
description: Stale dynamic inventory causes runs against wrong hosts or empty limits.
value: Detects SCM/cloud inventory sync failures before job templates target empty groups.
implementation: Map `inventory_id` to human name via lookup. Watch for cloud API throttling.

references.title: AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)

knownFalsePositives: Alerts from scheduled scans, pilot repositories, or vendor API throttling during bulk operations.
grandmaExplanation: We watch this part of your delivery chain for risks and reliability so issues show up before they hit customers.
